title: Tim Ryan says Harris should replace Biden as 2024 Democratic nominee
shortDescription: Former Ohio congressman says Vice President Kamala Harris should replace President Joe Biden at the top of the Democratic ticket.

title: Trump says SCOTUS ruling delivered 'high level spanking' to Jack Smith
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump claimed that the Supreme Court’s ruling on immunity delivered a “high level spanking” to special counsel Jack Smith.

title: GOP lawmaker charged after gun found in her luggage at airport
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Victoria Spartz was charged with a weapons violation Friday.

title: First Democratic lawmaker breaks with Biden, calls on him to step aside
shortDescription: Rep. Lloyd Doggett said Biden 'must not deliver us to Trump in 2024.'

title: Biden to meet Wednesday with Democratic governors amid campaign crisis
shortDescription: Democratic governors called for the meeting with the White House as concerns grow over Biden leaving the 2024 presidential race.

title: Trump attorney says fake elector scheme falls under 'official acts'
shortDescription: In a CNN interview, Trump attorney Will Scharf said he believes that the Supreme Court ruling should result in Trump’s conviction being overturned.

title: Will Democrats replace Biden? What it would take.
shortDescription: The president has committed to staying in the 2024 race, but it hasn't stopped speculation about Democrats going with another nominee.

title: Giuliani disbarred after court found he lied about 2020 election
shortDescription: Rudy Giuliani lost his New York law license after a state appeals court found he had lied in arguing that the 2020 presidential election was stolen.

title: Trump NY sentencing delay? Prosecutors agree after SCOTUS immunity ruling
shortDescription: Prosecutors in former President Donald Trump's New York hush money case said they don't oppose delaying sentencing in light of Trump's immunity argument.

title: Biden raises $127 million in June including $38 million since debate
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's campaign said it raised $127 million in June including $38 million since the day of last week's debate.

title: Supreme Court orders review of law behind Hunter Biden's gun conviction
shortDescription: The Supreme Court told another defendant convicted of the same gun charge as Hunter Biden to have his conviction reviewed again at the appeals court.

title: Biden's core support takes big hit, exclusive poll shows | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Hurricane Beryl may be a sign of what's to come this storm season. SCOTUS rules on presidential immunity. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Tim Kaine launches Virginia swing with reassurances about Joe Biden
shortDescription: At 'Salute to Service' opener in Petersburg, Sen. Tim Kaine is asked to tell fellow Democrats to 'turn down the noise' on president's re-election fitness

title: Biden v. Trump: The power of the 2nd choices of 3rd-party voters
shortDescription: Third-party voters helped Biden beat Trump in 2020. But for the 2024 election, they could assist Trump.

title: Trump claims Biden will pay 'big price' for 'weaponization' of justice
shortDescription: Donald Trump claimed in a new interview that Joe Biden will pay a “big price” for the “weaponization” of justice after Steve Bannon's was sentenced.

title: Wes Moore is focused on re-electing Biden
shortDescription: Maryland Governor Wes Moore sits down with Francesca Chambers to discuss his background, his surrogacy for Biden and his own political future.

title: Trump edges ahead of Biden in post-debate poll
shortDescription: Trump supporters are more enthusiastic about their candidate than Biden supporters are of theirs.

title: Wes Moore is the most popular Joe Biden surrogate. Can he quell panic?
shortDescription: Wes Moore is having a moment. An army vet. A successful author. Maryland's first Black governor and a top Biden campaign surrogate. And he’s only 45.

title: China, Saudi Arabia and Turkey: Trump's money from authoritarian regimes
shortDescription: During his presidency, Donald Trump's companies took an estimated $160 million from foreign governments. Ethics experts warn it could happen again.

title: A state-by-state map of where felons, including Donald Trump, can vote
shortDescription: Donald Trump’s historic felony conviction last month raised questions about his ability to vote for himself. Here's how the laws vary by state.

title: Biden says U.S. must 'render judgment' on Trump after SCOTUS decision
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said American voters will have to "render a judgment" on Trump's behavior now that the Supreme Court handed him partial immunity.

title: Biden addresses SCOTUS immunity ruling
shortDescription: President Joe Biden issued warnings to Americans ahead of the 2024 election following the U.S. Supreme Court's immunity ruling.
